violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. Observed open package of hotdogs in the walk in cooler not date marked.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Observed ice scoop in the hand sink at time of inspection.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Observed containers of cooked food in walk in cooler that were not date marked.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
